summary: Track A tabular placeholder: champion regressor is sklearn MultiOutputRegressor(Ridge) on sex + age_years; mean_baseline (per_sex) retained for comparison only.

champion.implementation: sklearn.pipeline.Pipeline: ColumnTransformer(StandardScaler on age_years, OneHotEncoder on sex) + MultiOutputRegressor(Ridge(alpha=1.0))

selection.rule: aggregate_ct_depth_runs.py: lowest test_mae_mean_cm excluding mean_baseline; ties: fewer band inversions, then newest run_id.

reproduction.note: Identical manifest bytes and seed reproduce the same split; floating-point training may differ slightly across sklearn versions.

artifacts.populate_models: Run freeze_ct_depth_baseline.py after training (copies from source run into frozen/models/).

limitations: Age parsed from filename stems; verify extraction_report.json.
Not wired into src/ or fusion; future Track A imaging model replaces this contractually for production imaging path.
